completed_steps: Phase 3 is backed by local Lighthouse evidence from 2026-06-26 with Performance 95, Accessibility 100, Best Practices 100, and SEO 100.

Phase 4 is closed for materials, channel decision, and owner approval scope: j-cherino@hsb-boden.de is canonical for flyer/mail outreach, info@hsb-boden.de remains the general/legal mailbox, and Outlook is historical fallback only.
CRM-Light is documented as template-ready for future lead import and the Phase 7 compliance/import gate documents define the blocked manual outreach path.
Phase 12 remains current but externally blocked by the pending NS/DNS switch.
Workflow risks fixed (commit a28fbb2): CI SHA-pinned, deploy-production.yml workaround applied.
Max-readiness doc sweep (2026-06-26 Tier 1): 7 new canonical readiness docs created, FINAL_CLOUDFLARE_WORKERS_READINESS_AUDIT converted to historical wrapper, all cross-references updated.

Final pre-go-live documentation wave (2026-06-26 Tier 2): 12 new detailed readiness docs created across cloudflare/, analytics/, email/, assets/, crm/, automation/, ops/, launch/. All Tier-1 canonical docs updated with cross-references. PROJECT_TRUTH.md, CHECKPOINT_STATE.json, FINAL_OPERATOR_HANDOFF.md, MASTER_EXECUTION_PLAN.md updated.

Cloudflare Pages www live verification (2026-07-08): https://www.hsb-boden.de/referenzen/ returns HTTP 200 and includes corrected references KESSLER-ZINK GmbH, Weingut Dohlmühle-Genussreich, and Flonheim.

Phase 7 lead import preparation extended for two operators: Joel Cherino Diaz and Jordi Post each get about 2,500 addresses when data volume allows; flyer attachment field is required before dispatch.

Lead attribution end-to-end (PR #79, 2026-07-13): 4 OpenAI review rounds all fixed, Codex privacy finding fixed, Playwright E2E proof without real lead; docs/crm/CRM_LIGHT_MAX_READINESS.md documents CRM mapping + connector gate.
